response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Perfect phonetic match between the vocal audio and the provided reference lyrics/dialogue. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were highly accurate for both 'Whisper Whisper Whisper' and 'BANG!!!'. They were utilized completely with precise manual alignment to the audio timestamps. The introductory dialogue was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously calibrated to ensure strict audio synchronization, avoiding any cascading delays, especially during the fast-paced rap sections of 'BANG!!!'.

subtitles.original: このコインは...
subtitles.english: This coin is...

subtitles.original: はぁ... そうか。君はそっちなんだね。
subtitles.english: Ah... I see. So you're on that side.

subtitles.original: そっち？
subtitles.english: That side?

subtitles.original: ここに座って。
subtitles.english: Sit here.

subtitles.original: えっ...
この後は君次第だよ。
subtitles.english: What happens next is up to you.

subtitles.original: 忘れられないのはこの目のせい
subtitles.english: It's these eyes' fault that I can't forget

subtitles.original: 赤く残る過ち甘噛みの跡
subtitles.english: About the red stains of my errors or the traces of play-biting

subtitles.original: 溢れだす愛は止めどもない
subtitles.english: The overflowing love doesn't even have an end

subtitles.original: 誰もいない間に悪魔を探す
subtitles.english: While there's no one else around, I search for the devil

subtitles.original: 作り笑いはこの耳のせい
subtitles.english: It's these ears' fault that my smiles are strained

subtitles.original: 深い壁の中から呼びかける声
subtitles.english: From within the thick walls, a voice calls out to me

subtitles.original: whisper, whisper, whisper まだ触らせない
subtitles.english: whisper, whisper, whisper, but it still doesn't let me touch

subtitles.original: この檻を抜け出して悪魔は駆ける
subtitles.english: The devil breaks out of this cage and races away

subtitles.original: 鏡の前でこの口のせい
subtitles.english: It's this mouth's fault that I'm in front of the mirror,

subtitles.original: 伝えたい言葉さえ噛み殺す夜
subtitles.english: stifling even the words I want to say tonight

subtitles.original: whisper, whisper, whisper まだ打ち明けない
subtitles.english: whisper, whisper, whisper, but I still won't open my heart

subtitles.original: 神様を裏切って悪魔と過ごす
subtitles.english: I turn my back on God and while away time with the devil

subtitles.original: 曖昧に
subtitles.english: Vaguely

subtitles.original: 夢見ていたい あなたに
subtitles.english: I want to dream... to you,

subtitles.original: そっと気付かせてあげたいだけ
subtitles.english: I want to gently make you realize, that's all

subtitles.original: oh あなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, even you

subtitles.english: Oh, even you

subtitles.english: Oh, even you

subtitles.english: I want to hide my scars... to you,

subtitles.original: そっと悩ませてあげたいだけ
subtitles.english: I want to gently make you worry, that's all

subtitles.original: oh あなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, even you

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い常識 I don't care 吹っ飛べ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Suki, kirai, common sense, I don't care! Blow it away, BANG!!!

subtitles.original: かかってこい majority あたしに負けはなし
subtitles.english: Come at me, majority! I never lose

subtitles.original: ここまでって引かれたそのボーダー 誰のルール？
subtitles.english: That border drawn up to here, whose rule is it?

subtitles.original: あの日乗り越えた weak heart
subtitles.english: Overcoming that weak heart from that day,

subtitles.original: 強くなったあたしが笑い飛ばしてあげる
subtitles.english: a stronger me will laugh it all off

subtitles.original: 言いたい事は言う
subtitles.english: I'm gonna say what I want to say

subtitles.original: やりたくない事はしない
subtitles.english: I won't do what I don't want to do

subtitles.original: 悪意気にしない
subtitles.english: I don't care about malice

subtitles.original: 皆違うの当然だし あたしも変わんない
subtitles.english: It's natural for everyone to be different, and I won't change

subtitles.original: ニューノーマルの時代
subtitles.english: This is the era of the new normal

subtitles.original: (Everybody say I want to be free)
subtitles.english: (Everybody say I want to be free)

subtitles.original: YesもNoも言わない それじゃ何も変えられない
subtitles.english: Not saying yes or no won't change anything

subtitles.original: (Everybody say I want to live more)
subtitles.english: (Everybody say I want to live more)

subtitles.original: 叶えたい自分肯定 生きてるんだあたし
subtitles.english: Fulfilling my self-affirmation, I am alive!

subtitles.original: ねえ 生きてるんだあたし
subtitles.english: Hey, I am alive!

subtitles.original: 歌えや歌え今を (声あげて)
subtitles.english: Sing, sing, for the present! (Raise your voice!)

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: I've been choosing since the moment I was born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ あたしはあたしだ
subtitles.english: Remember, I am myself!

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど何一つもない 嘘じゃない
subtitles.english: Nothing is impossible, it's not a lie

subtitles.original: なりたい自分に
subtitles.english: Into the self I want to be

subtitles.english: Suki, kirai, common sense, I don't care! Blow it away, BANG!!!

subtitles.original: フルテン鳴らす
subtitles.english: Sounding it out at full volume,

subtitles.original: このリリックかます
subtitles.english: blasting this lyric,

subtitles.original: わからす挑発
subtitles.english: provoking to make you understand,

subtitles.original: 下向いて舌打ちからの "は？"
subtitles.english: looking down, clicking my tongue, then "Huh?"

subtitles.original: (Excuse me)
subtitles.english: (Excuse me)

subtitles.original: あしからず倍返し
subtitles.english: No hard feelings, but I'll pay you back double

subtitles.english: Take this punchline!
